REASONING:
In Python, the `ArgumentTypeError` exception is used to indicate that a function has received an argument of the right type but an inappropriate value. This is similar to the `IllegalArgumentException` in Java, which is thrown to indicate that a method has been passed an illegal or inappropriate argument.
